title: GrassHopper
description: This modpack is lightweight with many features that push Minecraft to its limits in giving you the most FPS and the best experience. This modpack will make you have a smooth experience.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b81bbc81ee7318e6c846697f8d99fc28604c16c9.jpeg)

Getting tired of the low framed base game! Ever log onto a server but it lags so bad that your computer feels like it's in a volcano? 🌋
Enter the **GrassHopper modpack**: the ultimate game-changer that's about to hop into your life and kick that frame rate to the stars! ✨

When you "hop" onto Minecraft, here are some of the things you can expect:
- **Performance**: So smooth, you'll think your computer just got a spa treatment. 🧖
- **Client-Side Mods**: It's like a secret sauce that only you know about, making everything better without sharing the recipe with the server. 🍝
- **Game Integrity**: Keeps the Minecraft purists happy by not adding extra fluff. It's like a diet plan for your game—only the good stuff, no fillers! 🥤

Get ready to say goodbye to the days of 2 frame lagging and say hi to so many frames it can't even fit on your screen! GrassHopper is not just a modpack; it's a VIP pass to the world where you can actually play the game. 🎮
